# Transcrição: 01-Giveaways

- **Fonte:** 01-Giveaways
- **Duração:** 22:22
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

## [00:00 - 03:07]

Hello everyone and welcome to Train My Social Media Manager, Module 13. This is the very last module in your training for Train My Social Media Manager and I don't want to say the end of your journey but maybe just the beginning of your journey as a social media manager. So today we are going to talk about giveaways. Now this doesn't really fall within the iCOSA system that we've been learning about this whole training but I do think giveaways are a really important part of a social media strategy and a marketing strategy in general. Giveaways are going to help your social engagement, they're going to help your email list, they're going to help a bunch of things. So we're going to talk a little bit about that today and why we want to start incorporating giveaways into our strategy and also I will show you how to go ahead and set one of these up. So let's jump in. There are a few reasons why we would want to run a giveaway. Like I said, we're going to increase our engagement on social, we're going to fuel our email list growth strategy so we're going to get people off of our social media and over into our email list. We're going to create some email list engagement so it's kind of a reason for us to reach out to our list, let them know we have something going on when we don't have a promotion or something like that going on. And it creates a little bit of a buzz around your brand which is always a lot of fun to do on social media, get people talking about you and get people having a conversation on your platforms themselves. So let's talk a little bit about social engagement. When we run a giveaway, these giveaway posts tend to be some of our best performing posts on social media as far as engagement goes. So for example, we ran a Earth Day giveaway and we got 68,000 people to watch that little video, it's a little 30 second video and 392 comments on that Instagram post. We also ran a Facebook giveaway for $50 of free boom on us and you can see down at the bottom it reached over 255,000 people, over 12,000 engagements, we have over 500 comments and 37 shares on that post. And then another example here, we had a new giveaway for $100 of boom and that one reached over 70,000 people, 4900 engagement on that 764 comments and 38 shares. So you can see they fluctuate a little bit and this is going to depend on if we ran an ad to that specific post, if we ran a page post engagement ad to that specific giveaway post which we tend to do, they're going to be more or less depending on how long we let that ad run, on how long we had the giveaway going for. Sometimes they're only two or three day giveaways, sometimes we let them run for two weeks at a time. So there's going to be a little bit of difference in the amount of engagement on these different social posts. We also have YouTube, we toss it over on YouTube as well and this one here got us 647 views,

## [03:07 - 06:10]

117 likes on that post and 228 comments within that YouTube video. So it's a way for us to increase our engagement across our social channels. We like to run these about every six weeks or so. The only time we put a pause on them would be when we are running our holiday sale, our Black Friday, Cyber Monday sale which tends to go a lot longer than any other of our sales. We don't like to run a giveaway and a sale at the same time. So the other thing that your giveaways help with is going to be your list growth. And you can see here for our $50 giveaway back in April, we got almost 17,000 people to sign up for that list, raise their hand, say I want to enter this giveaway. And then in July we had 12,000 members, 12,349 members sign up for that giveaway. Now not all of these people on this list are brand new people and that's okay. Like I said, we're using this also to engage our list, engage the people that are already wanting to hear from us that already signed up for our email list or already on our social media in addition to trying to appeal to new customers, get new people to opt in for our email list, get new people to interact on our posts and our social media. So for example, we do email out this giveaway to our list, our engaged list and it looks something like this. We say $100 in free boom, enter to win now, do you love boom, you'll love this. And this goes out like I said, to our engaged list. So people that are already signed up for our email, we're reaching out to them and saying, hey, check out this giveaway that we're running right now. And these emails work really well for us in selling product and getting more people to engage in our emails. So for example here, you can see we had a 21% open rate on this email, 3.7% of people clicked it and it brought us in $26,000 in revenue. Now this wasn't an email designed to sell, right? This was an email saying, hey, we want to give away free stuff. Click here to enter to win and that would bring you up to our landing page, but it still drove sales. It still got people over to our site. It still got people interested in our products. So what we also do, another thing that we do for these giveaways is create a flow for people that opt in. So even if they're already on our email list, if they go ahead over to that page, enter their email, say they want to enter to win free boom, we set up an email flow. And when someone subscribes to the Clevio list, we go ahead and say you're entered. You want more chances to win. And that goes over to a landing page telling them, hey, you can enter by commenting on this post. You can enter by commenting on the Instagram post, commenting on YouTube, commenting on Facebook or entering your email. Make sure you tell a friend and I'll show you that landing page in a second.

## [06:10 - 09:13]

But that goes over to that. And then a day later, we say, hey, just for entering this giveaway, we want to give you this and we give them a discount and you can see that that brings in 57% open rate, 57% click rate and brings in almost $7,000. And then the next day we wait a day again, and if they haven't placed an order yet with that 10% off coupon, we say, hey, reminder, you still have this coupon and that one does amazing for us and brought in $16,000. So this is even before we've announced the giveaway winners. And in these emails, we say, hey, if you win, we'll refund you. So why not go ahead and place your order now for the boom that you want. And I'll show you those emails here. We have three emails, one of them says outstanding you're in. You're entered to win $50 in free boom. You're officially in. Check out these Facebook posts, check out our Instagram posts, check out our YouTube page. These are more ways for you to enter. And then that second email comes in and it says, hey, 10% off their entire store just for entering this giveaway. You entered, here's the 10% off. And the third and final email, which is a little bit longer if they haven't placed an order by that point, we say, hey, have you got your eye on something in our store? Make sure you use your discount. You have this discount and we give a little bit of information about some of our best performing best selling products. So that's kind of like the birds eye view of these giveaways, right? We have a landing page. We ask them to opt in. We have an email list. We have a thank you email. We have a thank you page. We have all these different assets that go into creating a giveaway flow. So how do we do it? Well, I'm going to walk you through that now and you'll need a few tools to get started. So I like to create this little checklist of things we're going to need. And this is in order of how you should do them. So you're not kind of going back and forth, right? So first you will need a list in Clavio. You need to create a specific list in Clavio that all of these people who are opting in for your giveaway are going to go into. And then you're going to want to create a flow in Clavio triggered by that list. You're going to want to create three to four emails for that flow. Create a thank you page thanking people for opting in that they're going to head to after they opt in after they put their email into that original landing page. You're going to want to give away opt in landing page. That's where they're actually putting their email. A more chances page to send them to once they've received their thank you email. You're going to want to send them to a page that says, hey, here are more ways for you to enter all of your social posts. So you're posting on Instagram, you're posting on Facebook, you're posting on YouTube, etc. And then you're going to want a winners email and a non winners email and then a winners social post. So these are all the things that you're going to need to go into creating this giveaway.

you page, the giveaway opt-in landing page. The more chances page, the social posts, a winners email and a non-winners email and then winners social posts.
